description:
Interactive whiteboard for schools and universities

OpenBoard is an open source cross-platform teaching software for interactive whiteboard designed primarily for use in schools and universities. It can be used both with interactive whiteboards or in a dual-screen setup with a pen-tablet display and a beamer.
What's Changed
- don't force white background on widgets for Qt versions above 6.8.0
- display a warning icon and message on broken documents to better inform the user on what to do with them
- fix: enable Cookie storage by @letsfindaway in https://github.com/OpenBoard-org/OpenBoard/pull/1445
- feat: document converter 1.8.0 to 1.7.x by @letsfindaway in https://github.com/OpenBoard-org/OpenBoard/pull/1443
- build: adapt to poppler 26.02 by @letsfindaway in https://github.com/OpenBoard-org/OpenBoard/pull/1434
Full Changelog: https://github.com/OpenBoard-org/OpenBoard/compare/v1.7.6...v1.7.7
